title: October 20
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|October}}

'''October 20''' is the 293rd day of the year (294th in leap years), with 72 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1920s#1923|1923]] – [[Patrick Jordan]] is born.
*[[1930s#1933|1933]] – [[Lev Mailer]] is born.
*[[1975]] – [[Sunil Malhotra]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Sam Witwer]] is born.
*1977 – ''[[Pizzazz 2]]'' published.
*[[1981]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 55|''Star Wars'' (1977) 55]] published.<ref name="tcr">''[[Amazing Heroes]]'' #5, [[Wikipedia:The_Comic_Reader#On_the_Drawing_Board.2FThe_Comic_Reader|''The Comic Reader'']] #195 and [[Wikipedia:The Comics Journal|''The Comics Journal'']] #67</ref>
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 70|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 70]] published.
*[[1992]] – [[Classic Star Wars 3|''Classic Star Wars'' 3]] published.
*1992 – [[Dark Empire 6|''Dark Empire'' 6]] published.
*[[1997]] – ''[[X-Wing: The Bacta War]]'' [[HarperCollins Publishers]] abridged cassette published.
*[[1999]] – [[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight|''Dark Forces: Jedi Knight'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[2003]] – ''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]'' published on the GameCube platform.
*[[2004]] – ''[[Star Wars Tales 21]]'' published.
*2004 – [[Empire 25|''Empire'' 25]] published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[Star Wars: Vector Volume 1, Chapters 1 & 2]]'' published.<ref name="DH">{{DarkHorse|url=Books/15-828/Star-Wars-Vector-Volume-1-of-2|text=Star Wars: Vector Volume 1 (of 2)}}</ref>
*[[2011]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic UK 6.26]] published.
*[[2012]] – "[[The Soft War]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].<ref name="Explore: The Soft War">{{SW|url=explore/the-clone-wars/ep504|text="The Soft War" - ''The Clone Wars'' Episode Guide}}</ref>
*[[2014]] – "[[Fighter Flight]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2015]] – ''[[Star Wars: Darth Vader Vol. 1 — Vader]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'': [[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Knights of the Fallen Empire|''Knights of the Fallen Empire'']] released.
*2015 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 1|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 1]] published in the United States.
*[[2016]] – [[Michael Massee]] is born.
*2016 – ''[[Star Wars Annual 2017]]'' published.<ref name="Egmont">{{Egmont|domain=co.uk|url=books/StarWarsAnnual2017/9781405283472|text=Star Wars Annual 2017}}</ref>
*[[2017]] – ''[[The Han Solo Trilogy]]'' reprinted as part of the [[Barnes & Noble Collectible Editions]] series.
*[[2018]] – ''[[The Star Wars Archives: Episodes IV–VI, 1977–1983]]'' published.
*[[2019]] – "[[Live Fire]]" airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2020]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Lightsaber Collection]]'' published.
*2020 – ''[[The Star Wars Book]]'' published.
*2020 – ''[[Leia, Princess of Alderaan, Vol. 1]]'' published in the United States.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars A Jedi, You Will Be]]'' published.
*[[2021]] – [[The High Republic (2021) 10|''The High Republic'' (2021) 10]] published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2020) 11|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2020) 11]] published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars Adventures: Ghosts of Vader's Castle 5|''Star Wars Adventures: Ghosts of Vader's Castle'' 5]] published.
<noinclude>
